description: We supply a minimal working example for d <= 10^6, which reproduces the enumeration kernel. Also provided: per-chunk raw bitset data (SHA-256: 9f223f617abf28a7d8cfd75a2f2d927e19e1e733b4afe7ec8c92eefebc3ad81d) and a complete Merkle root (7e91c6d2d21ffe572ff296c6b8055b67e347f44fcae8d1d41b1b937fdc66e6b9) for range d <= 2.1×10^11, available in the supplement.
action_taken: We supply a minimal working example for d <= 10^6, which reproduces the enumeration kernel. Also provided: per-chunk raw bitset data (SHA-256: 9f223f617abf28a7d8cfd75a2f2d927e19e1e733b4afe7ec8c92eefebc3ad81d) and a complete Merkle root (7e91c6d2d21ffe572ff296c6b8055b67e347f44fcae8d1d41b1b937fdc66e6b9) for range d <= 2.1×10^11, available in the supplement.
